title: System Response to Internal Conditions: The Zero-Input Response
summary: This page presents MATLAB-based examples for finding polynomial roots and zero-input responses of LTIC systems. Example 2.2 computes roots of λ^2 + 4λ + k for three values of k, and Example 2.3 begins solving the zero-input response of a second-order differential equation with specified initial conditions using dsolve.
